mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, title, description, biz_id, biz_type, depend_on_biz_id, depend_on_biz_type, owner_uid, handler_name, handler_type, config_data, show_in_dock, process_type, process_value, fast_fail, status, status_msg, time_of_start, time_of_last, time_of_finish
mapper.update: update rdp_async_task set status = 'WAIT_START', gmt_modified = now() where console_ip = #{consoleIp} and status = 'RUNNING'
update rdp_async_task set status = 'CANCEL', gmt_modified = now() where console_ip = #{consoleIp} and status = 'CANCELING'
update rdp_async_task set status = 'PAUSE', gmt_modified = now() where console_ip = #{consoleIp} and status = 'PAUSING'
update rdp_async_task set status = 'CANCEL', gmt_modified = now() where console_ip = #{consoleIp} and status = 'INIT'
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_async_task WHERE status = 'WAIT_START' and console_ip = #{consoleIp} order by gmt_modified asc limit #{limit}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM rdp_async_task WHERE status in ('FAILURE','COMPLETE','CANCEL') and gmt_modified <= #{beforeThisTime}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_async_task WHERE biz_id = #{bizId} and biz_type = #{bizType}
mapper.update: update rdp_async_task set status = #{toStatus}, status_msg = #{message}, gmt_modified = now() where id = #{taskId} and status = 'WAIT_START'
update rdp_async_task set status = #{toStatus}, status_msg = #{message}, gmt_modified = now() where id = #{taskId} and status = 'RUNNING'
update rdp_async_task set status = #{toStatus}, status_msg = #{message}, gmt_modified = now() where id = #{taskId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_async_task WHERE depend_on_biz_id = #{bizId} and depend_on_biz_type = #{bizType}
mapper.update: update rdp_async_task set status = 'WAIT_START', status_msg = #{message}, gmt_modified = now() where id in #{item} and status = 'BLOCK'
update rdp_async_task set status = #{toStatus}, status_msg = #{message}, gmt_modified = now() where status = 'BLOCK' and id = #{taskId}
update rdp_async_task set status = #{toStatus}, status_msg = #{message}, gmt_modified = now() where status = 'PAUSE' and id = #{taskId}
update rdp_async_task set status = 'WAIT_START', console_ip = #{consoleIp}, status_msg = #{message}, gmt_modified = now() where (status = 'FAILURE' or status = 'CANCEL') and id = #{taskId}
update rdp_async_task set status = 'WAIT_START', console_ip = #{consoleIp}, status_msg = #{message}, gmt_modified = now() where status = 'PAUSE' and id = #{taskId}
update rdp_async_task set status = 'WAIT_START', console_ip = #{consoleIp}, gmt_modified = now() where status = 'INIT' and id = #{taskId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_async_task WHERE id = #{taskId} and owner_uid = #{ownerUid}

SELECT
FROM rdp_async_task WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and show_in_dock = #{inDock} and status not in ('FAILURE','COMPLETE','CANCEL') order by gmt_create desc limit #{limit}

SELECT
FROM rdp_async_task WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and show_in_dock = #{inDock} and status in ('FAILURE','COMPLETE','CANCEL') order by gmt_create desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update rdp_async_task set status_msg = #{message}, gmt_modified = now() where id = #{taskId}
update rdp_async_task set status = #{toStatus}, status_msg = #{message}, gmt_modified = now() where id = #{taskId} and status = 'CANCELING'
update rdp_async_task set status = #{toStatus}, status_msg = #{message}, gmt_modified = now() where id = #{taskId} and status = 'INIT'
update rdp_async_task set process_type = #{processType}, process_value = #{processValue}, gmt_modified = now() where id = #{taskId}
update rdp_async_task set status = #{status}, gmt_modified = now() where id = #{taskId}
